name: Big Pit & Garn Lakes Heritage Trail
dog_lead_policy: On lead in World Heritage Site
highlights: UNESCO industrial heritage plus wildlife-rich reclaimed pools.
points_of_interest: Big Pit National Coal Museum (free entry, underground tour); Whistle Halt; Forge Row Garn-yr-erw
viewpoints: Blaenavon Ironworks chimneys; Heads of the Valleys
picnic_spots: Garn Lakes picnic area; Big Pit lawn
parking_start: Big Pit National Coal Museum car park (free)
food_drink_nearby: Big Pit cafe (inside museum); Horseshoe Inn Mamhilad; The Rifleman's Arms Blaenavon
hazards_notes: Check Big Pit opening times if you want the underground tour
